licensePolicy.notes: Epistemic governance bundle is evidence-forward. No autonomous adversarial execution.

nonClaims: This bundle does not grant authority to automatically remediate detected hygiene issues.
This bundle does not implement autonomous adversarial execution.
This bundle does not self-modify at runtime.
This bundle does not produce external side effects beyond bounded test artifacts.

determinism.note: Same input + same ruleset hash must produce same detector output
